title: [CI:DOCS]Add swagger.yaml to docs/
body:
Adding the swagger.yaml to the docs directory so that we can version the read-the-docs API information. also, change the links to be relative in nature and point to the new swagger.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v2.0/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Really wish we had a way to update this automatically on release, but we can look into that later
/lgtm
